content.description: Failed logins, lockouts, credential spray detection, and API token activity.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>Okta: Security Monitor</label>
    <description>Failed logins, lockouts, credential spray detection, and API token activity.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[{"title": "Okta: Security Monitor", "description": "Failed logins, lockouts, credential spray detection, and API token activity.", "inputs": {"input_global_trp": {"options": {"defaultValue": "-24h@h,now", "token": "global_time"}, "title": "Time Range", "type": "input.timerange"}}, "defaults": {"dataSources": {"ds.search": {"options": {"queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}}}}, "visualizations": {"viz_failed_logins": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_failed_logins"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#c12f28"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Failed Logins", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_lockouts": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_lockouts"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#c12f28"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Account Lockouts", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_spray_ips": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_spray_ips"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#c97a00"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Suspicious IPs (3+ users failed)", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_api_tokens": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_api_token_count"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "API Calls (Programmatic)", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_fail_trend": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_fail_trend"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Failed Auth Events Over Time", "type": "splunk.column"}, "viz_top_failed_users": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_top_failed_users"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Top Failed Login Users", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_top_failed_ips": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_top_failed_ips"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Top Failure Source IPs (Spray Risk)", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_api_token_events": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_api_token_events"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "API Activity by Actor & Action", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_recent_lockouts": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_recent_lockouts"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Recent Lockouts & Unlocks", "type": "splunk.table"}}, "dataSources": {"ds_failed_logins": {"name": "Failed login count", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=user.session.start OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa) | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | search outcome_result=FAILURE | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_lockouts": {"name": "Account lockout count", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.account.lock | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_spray_ips": {"name": "Suspicious IPs hitting 3+ distinct users", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=user.session.start) | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | spath output=client_ip path=\"client.ipAddress\" | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | search outcome_result=FAILURE client_ip=* username!=system@okta.com | stats dc(username) AS distinct_users by client_ip | where distinct_users >= 3 | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_api_token_count": {"name": "API token event count", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=ua path=\"client.userAgent.rawUserAgent\" | where match(lower(ua),\"python|curl|requests|okta-sdk|powershell\") | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$", "query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=ua path=\"client.userAgent.rawUserAgent\" | where match(lower(ua),\"python|curl|requests|okta-sdk|powershell\") | stats count AS total"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_fail_trend": {"name": "Failed auth trend", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=user.session.start OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa OR eventType=user.account.lock) | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | eval event_label=case(eventType=\"user.account.lock\", \"Account Lockout\", outcome_result=\"FAILURE\", \"Auth Failure\", true(), null()) | search event_label=* | timechart span=1h count by event_label", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_top_failed_users": {"name": "Top failed login users", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=user.session.start OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa) | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=outcome_reason path=\"outcome.reason\" | search outcome_result=FAILURE username!=system@okta.com | stats count AS failures, values(outcome_reason) AS reasons by username | sort -failures | head 20 | rename username AS User, failures AS Failures, reasons AS \"Failure Reasons\"", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_top_failed_ips": {"name": "Top failure source IPs", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=user.session.start) | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | spath output=client_ip path=\"client.ipAddress\" | spath output=username path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=geo_city path=\"client.geographicalContext.city\" | spath output=geo_country path=\"client.geographicalContext.country\" | search outcome_result=FAILURE client_ip=* username!=system@okta.com | stats count AS failures, dc(username) AS distinct_users, values(geo_city) AS city, values(geo_country) AS country by client_ip | sort -distinct_users | head 20 | rename client_ip AS \"Source IP\", failures AS Failures, distinct_users AS \"Distinct Users\", city AS City, country AS Country", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_api_token_events": {"name": "API token activity", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=actor path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=ua path=\"client.userAgent.rawUserAgent\" | where match(lower(ua),\"python|curl|requests|okta-sdk|powershell\") | stats count AS calls, max(_time) as last_seen by actor, eventType | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\") | sort -calls | head 20 | rename actor AS \"Actor\", eventType AS \"Action\", calls AS \"Calls\", last_seen AS \"Last Seen\"", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$", "query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log | spath output=actor path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=ua path=\"client.userAgent.rawUserAgent\" | where match(lower(ua),\"python|curl|requests|okta-sdk|powershell\") | stats count AS calls, max(_time) as last_seen by actor, eventType | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\") | sort -calls | head 20 | rename actor AS \"Actor\", eventType AS \"Action\", calls AS \"Calls\", last_seen AS \"Last Seen\""}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_recent_lockouts": {"name": "Recent lockouts and unlocks", "options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.account.lock OR eventType=user.account.unlock_by_admin OR eventType=user.account.unlock_token_issued OR eventType=user.account.reset_password) | spath output=username path=\"target{0}.alternateId\" | spath output=actor path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=client_ip path=\"client.ipAddress\" | eval action=case(eventType=\"user.account.lock\", \"Locked Out\", eventType=\"user.account.unlock_by_admin\", \"Unlocked (Admin)\", eventType=\"user.account.unlock_token_issued\", \"Unlock Token Issued\", eventType=\"user.account.reset_password\", \"Password Reset\", true(), eventType) | table _time, username, action, actor, client_ip | sort -_time | head 50 | rename username AS User, action AS Action, actor AS \"Performed By\", client_ip AS \"Client IP\"", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}}, "layout": {"globalInputs": ["input_global_trp"], "layoutDefinitions": {"layout_1": {"options": {"display": "auto", "height": 1290, "width": 2100}, "structure": [{"item": "viz_failed_logins", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 0, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_lockouts", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 520, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_spray_ips", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 540, "x": 1040, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_api_tokens", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 1590, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_fail_trend", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 2100, "x": 0, "y": 170}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_top_failed_users", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 1040, "x": 0, "y": 540}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_top_failed_ips", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 1050, "x": 1050, "y": 540}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_api_token_events", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 1040, "x": 0, "y": 910}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_recent_lockouts", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 1050, "x": 1050, "y": 910}, "type": "block"}], "type": "absolute"}}, "tabs": {"items": [{"label": "Security Monitor", "layoutId": "layout_1"}]}}}]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[
{
	"hideEdit": false,
	"hideOpenInSearch": false,
	"hideExport": false
}
    ]]></meta>
</dashboard>
content.label: Okta: Security Monitor
